steps.prompt:
Review the Phase 1 + Phase 2 implementation of the 'lair-health' Lair mini app at /Users/bugbookee/Desktop/ai/lair/lair-app-v2/apps/lair-health/.

Read all files in that directory and evaluate:

Score each category 0-10:
1. Lair SDK compliance — LairMiniAppClient usage, ready() called in main.tsx, auth from bridge initData
2. TypeScript strictness — no implicit any, correct types
3. React 19 patterns — proper hooks, no legacy patterns
4. Architecture quality — clean service/store/hook separation
5. Code completeness — no empty stubs, no TODOs

For each issue:
- Severity: CRITICAL / WARN / NOTE
- File + line number
- Problem
- Fix

Output format:
## Score: X/10
## Verdict: PASS / FAIL (threshold: 8/10)
## Critical Issues
## Warnings
## Summary

FAIL if any CRITICAL issues. Be strict.
